# Warframe Market Analytics

> Free, open-source real-time market analytics and trading tools for Warframe. Turns live Warframe.market order data into decisions: live platinum prices, prime set-vs-parts comparison, ducat efficiency, relic and riven valuation, vaulted-price tracking, flip finding and buy/sell timing.

Warframe Market Analytics (https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com) is a community-built web app for Warframe players ("Tenno") who trade for platinum. It is an independent fan project and is **not affiliated with Digital Extremes or Warframe.market**. All prices are in Warframe platinum and update continuously from Warframe.market public data.

## Languages
Fully localized — item/game names, interface and metadata — in 13 languages, each on its own URL prefix with hreflang alternates: English (default), Español (/es), Português (/pt), Deutsch (/de), Français (/fr), Русский (/ru), 한국어 (/ko), 日本語 (/ja), 简体中文 (/zh-hans), 繁體中文 (/zh-hant), Polski (/pl), Italiano (/it), Українська (/uk). Item names are sourced in each language from Warframe.market's own localized catalogue.

## Tools
- [Live Market Signals](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/live): real-time order feed with buy / sell / flip verdicts
- [Set vs Parts](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/comparison): whether a prime set is cheaper assembled or bought as parts
- [Relic Value](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/relics-value): expected platinum payout of every relic (Intact and Radiant)
- [Ducat Efficiency](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/ducats): best ducats-per-platinum prime parts for Baro Ki'Teer
- [Flip Finder](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/flip): widest, most liquid buy/sell spreads
- [Riven Value](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/riven-value): estimate a riven mod's worth by weapon disposition
- [Vaulted Primes](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/vaulted): vaulted sets ranked by price trend
- [Vault Spikes](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/vault-spikes): vaulted primes whose prices are spiking now
- [Top Movers](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/movers): items rising and falling in price
- [Volatility](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/volatility): most and least volatile items
- [Buy/Sell Timing](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/timing): best hours of day to trade each item
- [Market Screener](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/screener): filter items by price, volume, spread and tags
- [Relic Farming](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/relic-farming): best relics to farm by realizable platinum value
- [Star Chart Drop Map](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/star-chart): where every prime part and relic drops
- [Portfolio](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/portfolio): track inventory value, watchlist and price alerts
- [Endo / Platinum](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/endo): endo vs platinum value for Ayatan sculptures

## Guides
The Warframe Knowledge Center — 23 grounded, cross-linked guides. Hub: [Warframe Guides](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides).

Getting started
- [New Player Guide](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/new-player): what to do first, the star chart, first frames and mistakes to avoid
- [Best Beginner Warframes](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/beginner-warframes): which starter frame to pick and which to farm first
- [Progression Guide](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/progression): the roadmap — star chart, Junctions, Mastery Rank, what to do next
- [Mastery Rank Guide](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/mastery-rank): what MR unlocks, how affinity works, fastest leveling
- [Quest Order](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/quests): the recommended story quest order (spoiler-light)

Farming & currencies
- [How to Make Platinum](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/platinum): earn platinum free-to-play — what sells and how to price it
- [Credit Farming](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/credits): best credit farms — the Index, Profit-Taker, boosters
- [Kuva Farming](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/kuva): best Kuva farms for riven re-rolls and Kuva weapons
- [Focus Farming](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/focus): unlock the Operator, pick a school, best focus farms
- [Relic & Void Trace Farming](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/relics): how relics and traces work, cracking, refining to Radiant
- [Resource Farming](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/resources): where to farm every key resource (Orokin Cells, Argon, Tellurium…)
- [Standing & Syndicates](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/standing): cap daily standing across every syndicate
- [Endo Farming](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/endo): farm Endo efficiently and value Ayatan sculptures
- [Farming Hub](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/farming): search any item, resource or currency and jump to the best farm

Systems & builds
- [Mods Guide](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/mods): how modding works, must-have mods, shield-gating
- [Helminth Guide](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/helminth): the subsume system and best abilities to graft
- [Arcanes Guide](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/arcanes): what arcanes do, ranking them, where they drop
- [Riven Mods Explained](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/riven): disposition, rolling with Kuva, grading and trading

Endgame
- [Steel Path Guide](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/steel-path): unlock it and farm Steel Essence
- [Eidolon Hunting](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/eidolon): amps, the meta squad, Teralyst to full Tridolon
- [Railjack Guide](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/railjack): unlock, Intrinsics and turning it into a farm
- [Duviri Paradox](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/duviri): the Circuit, Decrees and weekly rewards
- [Archon Shards](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/archon-shards): farm them from the Archon Hunt, best stats
- [Tier List, Explained](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/guides/tier-list): how to actually read a Warframe tier list

## Community & reference
- [FAQ](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/faq): the r/Warframe FAQ, answered and searchable
- [Best Warframe Creators](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/creators): a verified directory of Warframe YouTubers worth following
- [Warframe Tools Directory](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/tools): the verified directory of the best third-party Warframe tools
- [Best Warframe Tools](https://warframe-app.digitalshopuy.com/tools/best): the must-have tools, ranked and verified

## Localization
Every URL above has localized equivalents at the locale prefixes /es /pt /de /fr /ru /ko /ja /zh-hans /zh-hant /pl /it /uk (English is the unprefixed default), each with hreflang alternates. Titles, descriptions, guide/FAQ content and item names are translated per locale; Warframe proper nouns stay in English.

## Source & data
- Source code (open source): https://github.com/eduair94/warframe
- Data source: Warframe.market public order data
- Author: Eduardo Airaudo — https://www.linkedin.com/in/eduardo-airaudo/

## Notes for citation
- Preferred name: "Warframe Market Analytics"
- One-line description: real-time Warframe.market analytics and platinum trading tools
- Free to use, no account required for most tools; independent fan project.
